proposed_improvements.current_gap: The prompt specifies 'RBAC: staging slot MI has Storage Blob Data Contributor on yankees-roster container' but does not mention that the slot MI also needs host storage (Blob/Queue/Table) and Key Vault roles for the Functions runtime to start.
proposed_improvements.proposed_improvement: Add to the task description: 'The staging slot MI must receive all the same RBAC roles as the production MI, plus Storage Blob Data Contributor on the data container. Specifically: Storage Blob/Queue/Table Data Contributor on the host storage account, Key Vault Secrets User on the Key Vault, and Storage Blob Data Contributor on the yankees-roster container.'

proposed_improvements.current_gap: The Risks section mentions 'Consumption Plan supports deployment slots but slot swap behavior differs from App Service' but doesn't confirm this as a known-good fact, leaving implementors uncertain.
proposed_improvements.proposed_improvement: Add a statement: 'Azure Functions Consumption (Y1/Dynamic) supports exactly one additional deployment slot. This is confirmed supported. Cold-start on the staging slot is expected; the cd-promote.yml smoke test retry count (5 attempts with 8s sleep) is designed to handle this.'

proposed_improvements.current_gap: The AC says 'Staging slot has identical app settings to production slot (except WEBSITE_SLOT_NAME)' but gives no guidance on how to enforce this at the Bicep level.
proposed_improvements.proposed_improvement: Add to the task: 'Use a Bicep variable (e.g. commonAppSettings) to hold shared settings. Both production and staging slots should reference this variable, with staging adding WEBSITE_SLOT_NAME via concat(). This enforces parity structurally.'

proposed_improvements.current_gap: The prompt only mentions WEBSITE_SLOT_NAME as a slot-sticky setting, but WEBSITE_RUN_FROM_PACKAGE is also a standard candidate.
proposed_improvements.proposed_improvement: Add: 'Mark both WEBSITE_SLOT_NAME and WEBSITE_RUN_FROM_PACKAGE as slot-sticky in the slotConfigNames config resource. Document that this list is authoritative — any future sticky settings must be added here.'
